CreateNewUser.description: Handles full user registration flow from input to database

methods.validateInput: Checks required fields and format (email, password length)
methods.verifyEmail: Sends confirmation link and waits for token match
methods.hashPassword: Bcrypt hashes the password before any persistence
methods.saveToDb: Writes the new user record via UserRepository

AuthenticateUser.description: Login flow: validates credentials and issues JWT

methods.findUser: Looks up account by email in the database
methods.compareHash: Runs bcrypt compare against stored password hash
methods.issueToken: Signs and returns a JWT with user role and expiry

UploadAvatar.description: Handles user profile image upload and resizing

methods.validateFile: Checks file type (jpg/png) and max size (5MB)
methods.resizeImage: Resizes to 256x256 using sharp before upload
methods.uploadToS3: Streams resized buffer to S3 and returns public URL
methods.updateUserRecord: Saves the new avatar URL to the user's database row

SendPasswordReset.description: Generates a reset token and emails a password reset link

methods.findAccount: Looks up user by email, returns null if not found
methods.generateToken: Creates a signed short-lived reset token (15 min expiry)
methods.sendEmail: Dispatches reset email with token embedded in link
